summary: Show All Prime Change Order Batches
description: Returns all Prime Change Order Batches for the specified Project.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Filter results by Change Order Batch ID

parameters.name: filters[change_order_id]
parameters.description: Filter results by Change Order ID

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description: Return item(s) within a specific updated at iso8601 datetime range

parameters.name: filters[status]
parameters.description: Array of Status. Return item(s) with the specified status.

parameters.name: filters[status][not]
parameters.description: Array of Status. Return item(s) that does not have specified status.
